message:
♻️ Deduplicate CachedHookResult<T> — single export from lib/cache (#9766)

The CachedHookResult<T> interface was copy-pasted identically in 9 hook
files. Extract it as a type alias (Omit<UseCacheResult<T>, 'clearAndRefetch'>)
exported from lib/cache/index.ts. All 9 files now import it from one
place instead of each defining their own copy.

useCachedCiliumStatus keeps its own CiliumCacheResult<T> (divergent shape:
isDemoData instead of isDemoFallback, no error field).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

-import { useCache, type RefreshCategory } from '../lib/cache'

 import { isBackendUnavailable, authFetch } from '../lib/api'
 import { kubectlProxy } from '../lib/kubectlProxy'
 import { clusterCacheRef } from './mcp/shared'
@@ -59,19 +59,6 @@ import type { Workload } from './useWorkloads'

-  error: string | null
-  isFailed: boolean
-  consecutiveFailures: number

-  refetch: () => Promise<void>
-}
